caption: Two men are seated in a room, positioned in front of a television screen and a soundbar. On the wall behind them, glowing yellow text reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt and maintains a neutral expression. The man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace, resting his chin on his hand. A shelf of CDs is visible behind them. A smaller video window is overlaid on the scene, showing a sequence from a different production. In the initial frames, this inset video depicts a group of people in dark clothing standing in a dimly lit hallway. As the sequence progresses, the scene in the inset changes to show figures standing before a doorway, and finally, a close-up of a man's face with a caption at the bottom that reads "The severity of Shebani's crimes".
